name: Mangools
tagline: Affordable SEO suite built around KWFinder
description: Mangools is a suite of five SEO tools — KWFinder (keyword research), SERPChecker (SERP analysis), SERPWatcher (rank tracking), LinkMiner (backlink analysis), and SiteProfiler (site metrics). Known for its clean UI and affordability, it is popular with bloggers, small businesses, and SEO beginners looking for an accessible Semrush alternative.
cons: Limited data volume on lower plans
use_cases: You're a blogger, freelancer, or small business owner who needs keyword research and rank tracking at a fraction of Ahrefs or Semrush prices
You're new to SEO and want a clean, non-overwhelming interface across keyword research, SERP analysis, and rank tracking
You need accurate keyword difficulty scores and local keyword data to find low-competition opportunities
Your budget is under $50/mo but you still need a complete five-tool SEO suite with backlink analysis
